ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the code module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code module */,
  "code_language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the code quality metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code quality standard */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code quality metric */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the code quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the method */,
  "npath_complexity" INTEGER /* NPath complexity of the method */,
  "sequence_coverage" REAL /* Sequence coverage of the method */,
  "branch_coverage" REAL /* Branch coverage of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES code_modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the code */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the code belongs to */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the code belongs to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the code was uploaded */,
  "code_file" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES code_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customizable_dashboard" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code quality metric */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the code quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control_systems" (
  "vcs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control system */,
  "vcs_name" TEXT /* Name of the version control system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version control system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vcs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code quality metric */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the code quality metric */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code quality metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the code quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code quality metric */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the code quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code quality metric */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the code quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upload_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload history */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the code was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
